title: salix caprea var. rotundifolia
intro: Salix caprea var. rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaf Goat Willow, is a variety of the Goat Willow tree (Salix caprea), characterized by its rounded leaves and unique growth habits. The medicinal properties of Salix caprea var. rotundifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function, while also acting as a natural antiseptic and anti-bacterial agent. Salix caprea var. rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
